tricount_key.description: Legacy optional default public Tricount key.

tricount_url.description: Legacy optional default public Tricount share URL.

tricount_urls.description: Optional default public Tricount share URLs.

output_dir.description: Base output directory for per-key exports.

start_date.description: Optional lower bound for exported transaction dates in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_date.description: Optional upper bound for exported transaction dates in YYYY-MM-DD format.
